rationale: Foreign LLC's name in its home jurisdiction. Per the entity-name-vs-home-jurisdiction convention, foreign-registration forms use entity.home_jurisdiction_name (matches MLLP-2, MBCA-2, MLPA-2).
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=336.5); enum_select value 'new'.
Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=335.9); enum_select value 'renewal'.

label_verbatim: SECOND: The state or other jurisdiction under the laws of which it is organized is
rationale: State or country of organization. Same key as MLLP-2/MBCA-2/MLPA-2.

label_verbatim: and the address of its principal office is located at: (line 1)
rationale: First line of principal-office address. Single combined-string canonical key (street + city + state + zip), filled across two widget lines. Matches MLLP-2's Text3+Text4 pattern; the form provides two physical underline widgets but the canonical concept is one address string.

Second line of principal-office address. Maps to the same canonical key as Text5 — synth/fill must split the address string across the two widget rects. Geometric evidence: Text6 rect (y=286–304) is ~37pt below Text5 (y=323–341), consistent with two stacked address lines, and the '(street, city, state and zip code)' caption appears below both. Note: drafter originally mapped Text6 to formation date — corrected to address line 2 here (formation date is Text7).

label_verbatim: THIRD: The date of its organization is
rationale: Date the LLC was organized in its home jurisdiction. Geometric evidence: Text7 (y=256–274) is ~30pt below Text6 (the address continuation), consistent with the THIRD section appearing on the next line.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: A brief statement of the nature of the limited liability company's business:
rationale: Free-form description of the LLC's business activities (unscoped — applies generally, not to Maine). Distinct from entity.maine_business_purpose used on MLLC-12 (which is Maine-scoped — the qualification form). This form is a name-registration; the LLC may not conduct business in Maine, so the question is unscoped. Matches MLLP-2/MBCA-2/MLPA-2's entity.business_purpose. Geometric evidence: Text8 (y=184–202) sits ~72pt below Text7, consistent with a section break for the FOURTH header text.

label_verbatim: *By ___ (signature of authorized person) / (type or print name and capacity)
rationale: Combined name+capacity widget — Shape D per filing-signer-shape convention. The wet-ink (signature) line has no AcroForm widget. Footnote (31 MRSA §1676.E) requires the application be signed by the person on whose behalf the application is being delivered.
